title: 霧を晴らすダイアローグ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the tryouts is here, but I can't stop thinking about what
T.M. Opera O said. If only I could understand her reasoning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll be able to find out at the race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aha... Your desire to see me won out at last.
choice_data_list: I was thinking I'd like to get to know you better.
I was thinking I'd like to get to know you better.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, then I'd be overjoyed to show you! Watch my race and be
amazed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but look now. My rivals have ventured forth in the midst of our
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oppy! I'm super excited to race today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I, uh... I w-won't do well, but... I'll try really hard!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! What fine spirits you're both in! I look forward to a
magnificently fierce bout between us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the fateful tryouts begin!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This glory... shall be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's such a close race that anyone could seize it. As the finish draws
near, T.M. Opera O pulls ahead, and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Barely, just barely, she takes first.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... So close, but... I couldn't make it...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... You two were so fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And yet, despite the win, Opera O looks so... sullen.
choice_data_list: Hey, good race. That was an impressive finish.
Hey, good race. That was an impressive finish.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Impressive... To you, perhaps. But not I...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, what's the matter with Oppy?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well, uh, maybe she didn't win the way she wanted to?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... This is just my own thought, and the truth might be a little
different... No, I'm sure I'm totally off...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But Opera O... She sets really high bars all the time. I learn a lot from
her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She's always saying, "My dignity as Overlord is at stake!" Her heart's
really in it, you know? So winning by a tiny lead isn't quite, um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her "dignity as Overlord..." I think I get why she looked so
uncharacteristically sad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't just want to win races. She wants to stand tall, true to her
name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to shake my concern, I chase after Opera O, and when I catch
up, the sky's overcast with dark clouds.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, you found me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Tell me, do you prefer a sunny sky or a cloudy one?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I favor one filled with sunlight. The shine of the radiant sun fills
people with bravery, you see.
choice_data_list: Uh, what are we talking about?
Uh, what are we talking about?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you about my dreams. Ah, but to tell the whole story, we
must travel into the past...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: When I was a young child, I once became lost in a gigantic forest.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of those dark woods, I had not an inkling of my
whereabouts... I'll always remember feeling as if I was the last person
in the world.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But then... Oh, I was bestowed with a great blessing! For that was the place where I met her...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Umamusume who would change my destiny!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... In the deepest depths of that surreal forest, I found her in a
spring of sweet water.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She smiled up at me from the water's crystal clear surface and told me
that all would work out in the end.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She had the mightiest presence in the world... The most beautiful... I
was moved to my very soul!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: To think that such a resplendent being had existed in this wide world!
choice_data_list: Wait, when you say you found her in the spring...
Wait, when you say you found her in the spring...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you understand now! The Umamusume gazing up at me from the
water was my very own reflection!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was stunned as if struck by the lightning of epiphany! Before that, I
was ignorant of my own hope-inspiring brilliance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I were to truly become a lord absolute... how astoundingly bright
the light of the Centurial Overlord would be!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I would become nothing less than the sun, which bathes the whole
world in its warmth!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I must become that! I must be the sun of Umamusume that brings prosperity to all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm more confused than ever...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I see at least that she's serious about taking on the title of
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What's this?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, behold! The heavens have opened!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The light that shines forth... That is the supreme radiance I will
achieve!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, now is not the time to mope about. The Overlord must train for
her next victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O sun! Praise be to you for showing me the light! Hahaha! Haaah ha
ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While T.M. Opera O is preoccupied with the sun on high, all I see is
the twinkling light of hope in her eyes.
